examples: He recognizes enough notation to be able to follow a score.
Musical notation was conceived for the C major scale and each line and space represents a note in this scale.
He believes that as far back as 30,000 B.C., hunters may have used a system of notation, engraved on bone and stone, to mark phases of the Moon.
He has since decided that this stark notation isn't such a good idea after all.
